stories.title: **Headline:** No. 12 FSU Defeats No. 5 Florida 3-1 — Isa Torres Homers Twice, Seminoles Win Rivalry

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Isa Torres hit TWO home runs. 🥎

No. 12 FSU 3, No. 5 Florida 1.

Torres tied it in the 1st, took the lead in the 3rd.
Ashtyn Danley locked it down with 4 scoreless innings.

FSU now 8 of last 9 vs Florida. 40-7. National seed.

#FSUSoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Florida scored first. Then Isa Torres happened. 🥎

FSU 3-1 Florida. Final.

Torres answered a leadoff HR with a solo shot.
Then homered again in the 3rd inning.

No. 12 FSU beats No. 5 Florida. National seed picture gets interesting.

#FSUSoftball #GatorsSoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: Isa Torres Homers Twice as No. 12 FSU Defeats No. 5 Florida 3-1 in Rivalry Showdown

stories.title: **Headline:** No. 17 Oklahoma State Shuts Out No. 4 Texas 5-0 — Ruby Meylan's 2-Hitter

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Ruby Meylan: 7 innings. 2 hits. 5-0 shutout. 🥎

No. 17 Oklahoma State just beat No. 4 Texas in Austin.

Davis and Hoffman hit 2-run HRs. Texas couldn't touch her.

Meylan beat OU in Bedlam. Now she beats Texas. Someone stop her.

#OKStateSoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Texas held to 2 hits. No. 4 upset. 🥎

Oklahoma State 5, Texas 0.

Ruby Meylan is the most dangerous pitcher you're sleeping on.
Back-to-back wins over OU and Texas in the same week.

Texas falls to 11-6 in the SEC. Seeding implications are real.

#OKStateSoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Kendall Wells at 32 HRs — OU Throws Staff No-Hitter, Record Chase Builds Steam

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells: 32 home runs. 🥎

5 away from tying Lauren Espinoza's all-time NCAA record (37, Arizona, 1995).

OU also threw a staff no-hitter Monday: 9-0 vs UAPB.

Oklahoma is locked in. Tied with Alabama at 15-3 in the SEC.

History is close. #Sooners #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Texas Tech Dominates UTEP 16-0, 11-1 in April 23 Doubleheader — Canady Road Trip Rolls

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Texas Tech ran UTEP off the field. Twice. 🥎

16-0. 11-1. Both 5-inning run-rules.

The Red Raiders are 44-4. No. 2 nationally.

The Texas State loss looks like a blip. This team is rolling.

#TexasTech #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Nebraska's 12-Game Win Streak Extends — Huskers Beat Omaha Before Record Crowd

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Nebraska has won 12 straight. 🥎

37-6. 17-1 Big Ten. No. 1 in Softball America.

Hit 4 home runs Wednesday against Omaha — in front of a record crowd.

Resume: wins over Texas, LSU, TTech, A&M, and South Carolina.

The Huskers are for real. #Huskers #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** SEC Race: Oklahoma and Alabama Tied at 15-3 — SEC Tournament Seeding in Focus

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Oklahoma and Alabama are TIED at 15-3 in the SEC. 🥎

OU: 42-6. Alabama: 42-4.

Texas has fallen to 11-6 in the conference after the OSU loss.

Three weeks left. Every game counts.

The SEC race is as tight as it gets. #CollegeSoftball #SECSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** WCWS Selection Countdown — 17 Days to May 10, 32-Team Seeding Reshapes the Field

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
17 days until the 2026 WCWS selection show. 🥎

32-team seeding debuts this year.
Top 16 seeds earn regional hosting rights.
Selection show: May 10. Regionals: May 15.

FSU's win over Florida just moved the needle.

The bracket is being written in real time. #CollegeSoftball #WCWS
